title: Error when creating new boardview build
excerpt: I’ve been trying to create new versions of my boardview in my app using the Custom URL deployment, but I get a 500 HTTP response, and then I just have multiple versions of the same build spinning each time.

posts.author: SuavePirate (Alex Dunn)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve been trying to create new versions of my boardview in my app using the Custom URL deployment, but I get a 500 HTTP response, and then I just have multiple versions of the same build spinning each time.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SuavePirate

My warmest welcome to the community! I hope you enjoy your stay

That sounds really odd! Could you please provide a screen recording of the steps you’re taking that are leading up to this behavior? I would love to take a closer look and see if there’s something that sticks out.

I’m looking forward to hearing from you soon!

-Alex

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @SuavePirate!

Are you still experiencing this issue? If so, please post a new thread or email into appsupport@monday.com.

Closing this for now.
